headline: Quantum Computing Researcher | Quantum Cryptography | Software Engineer
shortBio: I am Joy Kumar Ghosh, a Computer Science graduate from North South University with a CGPA of 3.77/4.00. I have strong foundations in software engineering, backend systems, databases, machine learning, and quantum computing research. I have professional experience as an Oracle APEX Web Application Developer Intern at MySoft Limited (Aug 2025 – Nov 2025), working on enterprise-scale backend systems.
